oneLineSummary: A full-stack meal planning tool that combines ingredient tracking, recipe suggestions, grocery comparison, and AI-assisted planning to support lower-waste household decisions.

summary.systemDefinition: A MERN-style application focused on food inventory visibility and meal planning support.
coreWorkflowsFeatures: Ingredient tracking for fridge and pantry items
Weekly meal planning and lunchbox-oriented suggestions
Recipe discovery, shopping list creation, and grocery price comparison
summary.businessOrOperationalImpact: The product concept helps users make more budget-aware and lower-waste food decisions in everyday household planning.
summary.engineeringValue: It shows API integration, applied AI feature thinking, and full-stack coordination across frontend, backend, and data workflows.

projectNarrative.problem: People often lose track of ingredients, overbuy groceries, and struggle to turn available food into practical meal plans.
projectNarrative.approach: We designed a web application that pairs inventory visibility with meal generation, recipe discovery, and external grocery comparison workflows.
projectNarrative.result: The project demonstrated how AI-assisted suggestions can make routine household planning more practical and user-centred.

engineeringHighlights: REST API integration across planning and inventory flows
User-centred interface design for planning-heavy interactions
Backend coordination with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB
Collaborative delivery using modern frontend engineering practices

reflection.tradeoffs: Combining smart suggestions with transparent user control meant keeping the planning workflow explainable instead of over-automated.
lessonsLearned: AI features are more useful when grounded in clear user workflows.
Planning tools need good defaults and simple state transitions.
Cross-team alignment matters when UX, backend logic, and AI features evolve together.
futureImprovements: Improved data freshness for grocery comparisons
More structured testing around planning edge cases

display.heroImageAlt: AI-enabled inventory and meal planning application preview
display.libraryFocus: API integration, AI-assisted features, and user-centred workflow design
